mapper.select: SELECT d.device_token FROM admin_mobile_device d INNER JOIN admin_user a ON a.id = d.admin_user_id WHERE d.vendor = #{vendor} AND d.push_enabled = TRUE AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND a.is_super_admin = TRUE ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC

SELECT d.device_token FROM admin_mobile_device d INNER JOIN admin_user a ON a.id = d.admin_user_id WHERE d.vendor = #{vendor} AND d.push_enabled = TRUE AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC
